title: Zenith Aastrika
description: The Warlord-Priestess of the Sunlight Legion. Show when the party first encounters the Zenith at the Crater of the Core (Z9).

title: Fire Giant Lightbearer
description: A Lightbearer in spiritual meditation. Use for sanctuary scenes or when the party encounters healers.

title: Fire Giant Red Fist
description: An elite warrior-monk of the Sunlight Legion. Use for the Crucible (Z3) or any Red Fist encounter.

title: Fire Giant Trooper
description: A rank-and-file soldier of the Enclave. Use for guard encounters or the Barracks (Z8).

title: Ostios — Basalt Stone Giant
description: The master smith hired by Aastrika. Show when the party enters the Forge (Z5).

title: Hellhound
description: An infernal hound hardened by the volcanic heat. Use for patrol encounters or guard beasts.

title: Roaring Peak
description: The volcanic exterior of the Molten Enclave. Show during the Approach or as an establishing shot.

title: The Crown of Flame
description: Aastrika's Crown with the hagstone set at its center. Show when the party first learns about the crown or during the Crown Heist.

title: The Crater of the Core
description: The sacred lava pool at the heart of the Enclave (Z9). Show when entering the boss room.

title: The Forge
description: The massive magma forge with Hurga and Ostios at work (Z5). Show when entering the Forge.

title: Monument of Molten Blades
description: A sculpture forged from the weapons of dead adventurers. Show for dramatic effect in the Forge.

title: The Crucible
description: The fighting pit where Red Fists spar (Z3). Show when the party witnesses or enters the arena.

title: The Sleeping Quarters
description: The barracks where fire giants sleep in massive stone slab beds (Z8). Show when approaching the barracks.

title: Entering the Enclave
description: The labyrinthine magma tunnels beneath Roaring Peak. Show when beginning the tunnel navigation challenge.

title: Sneaking Past the Crucible
description: The Crucible arena viewed from the shadows. Show during the stealth challenge past the fighting pit.

title: The Forge Fumes
description: The toxic forge where Hurga hammers and sulfur fills the air. Show during the forge crossing challenge.

title: The Sleeping Barracks
description: Rows of sleeping fire giants in their stone slab beds. Show during the barracks stealth challenge.

title: Crown Heist
description: The Crater of the Core where Aastrika meditates with the Crown. Show during the hagstone extraction challenge.

title: Escape the Enclave
description: Collapsing tunnels and surging lava during the desperate escape. Show during the escape challenge.
